notes: Initial bootstrap criteria seeded from repository creation.
ship_rules: Only ship a game candidate after smoke validation passes repeatedly.
Prefer small reversible changes with one commit per loop.
Record all criteria and monetization changes in journal and memory.

monetization_change.summary: Defer monetization until core loop stability is proven.

next_step.rationale: Consistent journaling enables future loops to learn from past history and improves observability.

rest_decision.reason: Continue with another small step after a short bounded rest.
